subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who heareth my lamentation, my sighs, my moaning and wailing, and Who beholdeth my grief, my yearning and my distress! [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من هو سمیع لضجیجی و انینی و تاوهی و زفیری و بصیرا بتاسفی و تلهفی و تلبهی
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for the departed, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
